Mass.name: Mass
Mass.description: 1D mechanical mass. Accelerates according to Newton's second law.

Spring.name: Spring
Spring.description: 1D mechanical spring. Exerts force proportional to displacement.

Damper.name: Damper
Damper.description: 1D mechanical damper. Exerts force proportional to relative velocity.

Ground.name: Ground
Ground.description: Fixed ground reference. Position is fixed at zero.

Force.name: Force
Force.description: External force actuator. Applies a constant external force.

PositionSensor.name: PositionSensor
PositionSensor.description: Exposes the absolute position of the connected port junction.

VelocitySensor.name: VelocitySensor
VelocitySensor.description: Exposes the absolute velocity of the connected port junction.
